description: Independent test vectors for CCP-12 synchronized hopping sequence and channel selection using hash_32 (keyed CRC32 with 'LICHEN' prefix). Oracle is external CRC32 computation, not derived from LICHEN sim or node code. Covers SFN wraparound, rendezvous announcement parsing, freq selection for 8/16 channels. Matches Rust identity::hash_32, C tuple_crc, Python sim. Used for cross-impl validation per RustCrypto discipline.
